title: Explain the Executor framework in Java. Why is it preferred over manually creating threads?

answers.junior: Executor framework manages thread creation and execution. It is easier and safer than manual threads.
answers.middle: Executor framework provides thread pools, task scheduling, and resource management. It improves scalability and reliability.
answers.senior: Executor framework decouples task submission from execution. It manages thread lifecycle, pooling, and reuse. Use ExecutorService for robust concurrency. Manual threads are error-prone and hard to scale.
answers.tricky: Executor framework supports advanced features: scheduled tasks, custom thread pools, and rejection policies. Prefer Executors for production systems. Analyze thread pool sizing and task queueing for optimal performance.
